stimulus: Wanda Diaz-Merced is an astrophysicist who lost her sight when she was young. Diaz-Merced’s experience motivated her to create software that translates scientific data into audio. Audio-based tools ______blank researchers to identify subtle patterns in data. Such patterns may not be visible in conventional graphs.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The plural verb “allow” agrees in number with the plural subject “audio-based tools.”

Choices B, C, and D are all singular verb forms that don’t agree with the plural subject.
